command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 'sleep 45 && cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import json, datetime, subprocess, time
from pathlib import Path
JOB = \"phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2\"
RUN = \"bg-20260623T215532Z-419b7e44\"
WS = Path(\"memory/execution-pipeline/governed\") / JOB / \"_background\" / RUN

def read_hb():
    p = WS / \"heartbeat-liveness.json\"
    if p.is_file():
        d = json.loads(p.read_text())
        return d.get(\"hb_count\"), d.get(\"ts\"), d.get(\"stage\"), d.get(\"wave11_version\")
    return None, None, None, None

print(\"=RUN STATE=\")
sp = WS / \"run-state.json\"
if sp.is_file():
    d = json.loads(sp.read_text())
    print(\"status:\", d.get(\"status\"))
    print(\"wave11_version:\", d.get(\"wave11_version\"))
    print(\"lease_expires_at:\", d.get(\"lease_expires_at\"))

c1, ts1, s1, v1 = read_hb()
print(f\"\n=HB READ 1= count={c1} ts={ts1} stage={s1} wave11={v1}\")

time.sleep(30)

c2, ts2, s2, v2 = read_hb()
print(f\"=HB READ 2= count={c2} ts={ts2} stage={s2} wave11={v2}\")

if c1 is not None and c2 is not None:
    print(f\"HB COUNT DELTA: {c2} - {c1} = {c2-c1} (expect >= 1 in 30s with 25s interval)\")
    if c2 > c1:
        print(\"HB THREAD CONFIRMED RUNNING INDEPENDENTLY\")
    else:
        print(\"WARNING: hb_count did not increment\")

r = subprocess.run([\"kill\",\"-0\",\"75729\"], capture_output=True)
print(\"PID 75729:\", \"ALIVE\" if r.returncode==0 else \"DEAD\")

print(\"=LEDGER TAIL=\")
lp = WS / \"event-ledger.ndjson\"
if lp.is_file():
    lines = lp.read_text().strip().split(\"\n\")
    for l in lines[-5:]: print(l)

print(\"=STREAM ACTIVITY=\")
sa = WS / \"stream-activity.json\"
if sa.is_file():
    d = json.loads(sa.read_text())
    print(\"model:\", d.get(\"model\"))
    print(\"status:\", d.get(\"status\"))
    print(\"started_at:\", d.get(\"model_request_started_at\"))
else:
    print(\"none yet\")
" 2>&1'
